import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { NotFoundPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <NotFoundPage
    serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'አማርኛ' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}
    copyright="© 2026 Government of Ethiopia."
  />
</PageExample>

Page not found — a plain-language explanation plus a way forward
(search, links home and to all services), never a dead end and never the
raw word "404" in citizen-facing text.

```tsx
import { NotFoundPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<NotFoundPage
  serviceName="Government of Ethiopia"
  languages={[{ code: 'en', label: 'English' }]}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* … */ }}
  onSearch={(query) => { /* … */ }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Render this for any broken or moved URL. The host application is
responsible for returning the actual HTTP `404` status; this component
only renders the page body.

## Accessibility & localization

- One `<h1>`, the standard `Header`/`Footer` chrome, and a skip link, like
  every ETHDS template.
- The search field and "try instead" links give the citizen a real next
  step rather than a dead end.
- All text is a `labels` prop with English defaults, overridable per
  locale.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `homeHref` | `string` (default `'/'`) | No |
| `servicesHref` | `string` (default `'/services'`) | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `onSearch` | `(query: string) => void` | No |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `labels` | `Partial<NotFoundPageLabels>` | No |
